news.title: The trends that will shape AI and tech in 2026 | IBM
news.snippet: IBM has publicly stated that 2026 will mark the first time a quantum computer will be able to outperform a classical computer—the point at which a quantum computer can solve a problem better than all classical-only methods.

tech.title: Building AI Applications in 2026: A Practical Guide to Product Utility and Conversion Readiness
tech.snippet: A practical Unicorn Platform guide for building AI applications in 2026, covering architecture choices, costs, timelines, trust design, and conversion-ready launch workflows.
